creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213012
py-django-netfields-1.2.2.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-netfields to 1.2.2 and assigns it from Django 1.11 (End-of-Life since April) to Django 2.2 (next LTS release, supports only Python 3.5 or newer).

QA:
~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py35, py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
